task: feat: roteamento de agentes por tipo de tarefa — mapear Explore/Plan/Code para modelos distintos (issue #50)

todos.title: Add TaskType type, AgentRoutingConfig struct, and [agent_routing] TOML parsing in config package
Implement ClassifyTask(prompt string) TaskType in new internal/llm/classify.go with keyword-based classification
Implement AgentRouter struct in internal/llm/router.go with NewAgentRouter factory and ClientFor(taskType) Streamer method
Wire AgentRouter into Agent loop — classify prompt on Run(), select model via ClientFor, pass active model info back
Add --task-type persistent flag to root command and force-explicit-type logic bypassing automatic classification
Display active model per task type in TUI statusbar (right side, alongside or replacing current model label)
Update devon profiles test to validate connectivity of all models listed in [agent_routing] section
Write table-driven tests for ClassifyTask covering all task types and edge cases (empty, unknown, mixed)
Write tests for AgentRouter.ClientFor covering mapped types, unmapped types, nil routing, and default fallback
Run full build, test, vet, lint suite until green — ensure zero breaking change when [agent_routing] absent
